svg.text: CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET — THE KING'S REGRET
• Skin: golden-warm, slightly luminous. Never harsh.
• Eyes: large, kohl-lined, with a divine light point
• Garments: white/cream with gold borders, flowing
• Aura: soft radial glow — always present, never sharp
• Light trails follow hand movements throughout
• Fading: dissolve UPWARD — not sideways, not downward
• Never punitive — even recoil reads as wounded, not angry
• Dream form: more translucent, edges soft-blurred
Arc: Warmth → Hurt → Fading → Ethereal guidance
